name: ACE-Lite Engine
description: Local-first repo context retrieval via ACE-Lite (MCP stdio). Exposes ace_* tools and can auto-inject plan_quick context before an agent starts.

repo.description: Optional repo identifier; defaults to the root folder name.

languages.description: Comma-separated language profile passed to ace_* tools.

python.command.label: Python Command
python.command.help: Python executable used to spawn `python -m ace_lite.mcp_server --transport stdio`.

python.extraArgs.label: Python Extra Args
python.extraArgs.help: Extra args appended after `python` (advanced). Useful for venv wrappers.

root.label: Repo Root
root.help: Repository root directory (relative paths are resolved via OpenClaw).

repo.label: Repo ID
repo.help: Optional repo name; defaults to folder name.

skillsDir.label: Skills Dir
skillsDir.help: Markdown skills directory used by ace_plan (relative to root).

languages.label: Languages
languages.help: Comma-separated language profile for indexing and retrieval.

autoContext.label: Auto Context Injection
autoContext.help: Automatically inject ACE-Lite context via before_agent_start hook.

autoMode.label: Auto Mode
autoMode.help: Which ACE-Lite retrieval to run for auto-injection.

maxCandidateFiles.label: Max Candidate Files
maxCandidateFiles.help: Number of candidate files to inject from plan_quick.

candidateRanker.label: Candidate Ranker
candidateRanker.help: Ranker used by plan_quick index stage.

repomapBudgetTokens.label: RepoMap Budget Tokens
repomapBudgetTokens.help: Token budget for repo map markdown (only in modes that include repomap).

repomapTopK.label: RepoMap Top K
repomapTopK.help: Max number of files in repomap selection.

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Timeout applied to each tool call and auto-injection retrieval.
